choices.text: Optimistic (Arbitrum, Optimism, Base): EVM-equivalent, drop-in deploy, but 7-day withdraw window. ZK rollups (zkSync, Polygon zkEVM, Scroll): faster finality + withdraws (minutes-hours), some compat quirks. Use OP-stack L2s for max ecosystem reuse.

questions.explanation: Optimistic = compat + slow withdraw; ZK = fast withdraw.

choices.text: CREATE2 with same salt + bytecode produces same address on every chain. Deploy factory at same address (using same deployer nonce 0); then deploy contracts via factory. Users recognize consistent addresses.

questions.explanation: CREATE2 + same salt + bytecode = same address.
